$schema: Sprint contract defining testable done conditions

example.title: Authentication and Core Layout
example.scope: User registration, login, session management, and app shell with navigation

done_conditions.description: User can create an account with email and password
done_conditions.test_steps: Navigate to /signup, fill form, submit, verify redirect to dashboard

done_conditions.description: User can log in with existing credentials
done_conditions.test_steps: Navigate to /login, enter credentials, submit, verify dashboard loads

done_conditions.description: Navigation bar shows user name when authenticated
done_conditions.test_steps: After login, verify nav bar displays the user's name

done_conditions.description: Unauthenticated users are redirected to login
done_conditions.test_steps: Navigate to /dashboard without auth, verify redirect to /login

dependencies: Database must be provisioned or use SQLite for dev
